topIngredients.name: Ceramides (1, 3, 6-II)
topIngredients.benefit: Restores and reinforces the skin barrier

topIngredients.name: Glycerin
topIngredients.benefit: Draws moisture into the skin from the environment

verdict: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream is a benchmark formulation. Developed with dermatologists, its ceramide trio and hyaluronic acid combination restore barrier integrity while maintaining deep hydration. Exceptional for eczema-prone and sensitive skin.
